title: Scout: Refabricated
description: Scout is a mod focused on "physically" extending the inventory (adding slots) by wearing various types of bags
body:
----
Scout is a mod focused on "physically" extending the inventory (adding slots) through wearing various types of bags. It is heavily inspired by makamys' Satchels.

Bags are equipped through Trinkets slots. Pouches have their own slot added on the legs area. Items are retained on the bag item itself. There is a preview in the tooltip of the item to see what is inside. Mod Interactions [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) - Exclusion zones, default recipes for recipe tree [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) - Exclusion zones A Forge version is not planned. Original Mod page: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/scout
